overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a rainy, foggy cyberpunk city street at dusk, featuring the distinctive neon-lit architecture of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077. The player character moves along wet sidewalks beneath towering futuristic buildings and massive steel overpasses, passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles while atmospheric haze obscures the distant skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under massive steel overpass

events.description: black sedan drives past from left to right on the wet road
emerging from under the overpass into the open intersection area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the massive steel overpass, approaching the intersection with East Bay Bridge signage

entered.detail: large industrial steel bridge structure spanning across the road with heavy support pillars
tall building with illuminated 05 signage near the top
curved elevated highway structure with red lighting accents
tall structure with multiple stacked digital advertisement screens
tall pole with traffic signals and street signs attached

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive steel overpass in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The camera moves forward along a wet concrete sidewalk, passing beneath the industrial structure with the 05 building visible to the left. A black sedan drives past on the road as the camera approaches an intersection with visible East Bay Bridge and Cola signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and waterfront access

events.description: approaching a pedestrian with distinctive blue hair standing at the crosswalk
purple sports car speeds past from right to left through the intersection
turning right to follow the sidewalk along the waterfront barrier

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk, waiting for a purple sports car to pass, then crossing and turning right along the waterfront

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair and white boots standing at the crosswalk then walking forward
futuristic purple sports car driving quickly through the wet intersection

entered.detail: metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the water below
fog-obscured futuristic skyscrapers with neon lighting across the water

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into a wide-open intersection. A pedestrian with blue hair stands at the crosswalk as a sleek purple sports car speeds past. The camera then turns right to follow the waterfront promenade, with a metal railing now visible on the right side and the distant foggy skyline across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with city skyline views

events.description: passing by multiple pedestrians walking along the waterfront railing
stopping at red traffic light then continuing as it changes

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront sidewalk, passing various pedestrians and observing the city skyline across the water

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright orange jacket walking along the railing while looking at the water

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open waterfront promenade with the metal railing on the right and the city street on the left. The camera passes several pedestrians including one in a bright orange jacket. Traffic lights and street signs including a Milwaukee sign and speed limit 40 sign are visible as the camera continues forward along the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital signage and neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered walkway section with overhead digital billboards
passing close by a pedestrian holding a large illuminated umbrella
moving deeper into the covered area with prominent neon lighting and digital displays overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway, passing a pedestrian with a futuristic illuminated umbrella and approaching the Heywood district signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a large black umbrella with blue LED lights along the rim, walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: curved transparent and metal roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway with integrated lighting
overhead directional sign indicating Heywood district with arrow symbols
large curved digital screen displaying advertisements above the walkway
modern building with curved glass facade and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian walkway with a curved transparent roof and prominent neon lighting. A pedestrian with a futuristic illuminated umbrella passes by on the left. Overhead digital billboards display advertisements including one for Heywood district. The environment becomes more sheltered with artificial lighting dominating as the camera moves deeper into the covered corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the industrial shadows of a massive overpass into the neon-lit shelter of a futuristic pedestrian corridor. It begins by moving along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath a steel structure, passing a black sedan and corporate signage as it approaches a city intersection. As the camera emerges from the overpass into the open air, it passes a blue-haired pedestrian and a speeding purple sports car before turning right to follow a waterfront promenade lined with metal railings and a foggy skyline. The scene then continues along the wet pavement past pedestrians in bright clothing and various street signs, gradually shifting from the open waterfront toward the city's interior. Finally, the camera enters a covered walkway with a curved transparent roof, where artificial neon lighting and digital billboards for the Heywood district replace the natural dusk light.
